name: users

columns.name: is_sso_user
columns.comment: Auth: Set this column to true when the account comes from SSO. These accounts can have duplicate emails.

comment: Auth: Stores user login data within a secure schema.

name: refresh_tokens
comment: Auth: Store of tokens used to refresh JWT tokens once they expire.

name: instances
comment: Auth: Manages users across multiple sites.

name: audit_log_entries
comment: Auth: Audit trail for user actions.

name: schema_migrations
comment: Auth: Manages updates to the auth system.

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: Field is deprecated, use owner_id instead

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: Field is deprecated, use owner_id instead

name: identities

columns.name: email
columns.comment: Auth: Email is a generated column that references the optional email property in the identity_data

comment: Auth: Stores identities associated to a user.

name: sessions

columns.name: not_after
columns.comment: Auth: Not after is a nullable column that contains a timestamp after which the session should be regarded as expired.

columns.name: refresh_token_hmac_key
columns.comment: Holds a HMAC-SHA256 key used to sign refresh tokens for this session.

columns.name: refresh_token_counter
columns.comment: Holds the ID (counter) of the last issued refresh token.

comment: Auth: Stores session data associated to a user.

name: mfa_factors

columns.name: last_webauthn_challenge_data
columns.comment: Stores the latest WebAuthn challenge data including attestation/assertion for customer verification

comment: auth: stores metadata about factors

name: mfa_challenges
comment: auth: stores metadata about challenge requests made

name: mfa_amr_claims
comment: auth: stores authenticator method reference claims for multi factor authentication

name: sso_providers

columns.name: resource_id
columns.comment: Auth: Uniquely identifies a SSO provider according to a user-chosen resource ID (case insensitive), useful in infrastructure as code.

comment: Auth: Manages SSO identity provider information; see saml_providers for SAML.

name: sso_domains
comment: Auth: Manages SSO email address domain mapping to an SSO Identity Provider.

name: saml_providers
comment: Auth: Manages SAML Identity Provider connections.

name: saml_relay_states
comment: Auth: Contains SAML Relay State information for each Service Provider initiated login.

name: flow_state
comment: stores metadata for pkce logins

columns.name: currency
columns.comment: Currency code for vendor prices (GBP, EUR, USD)

columns.name: needs_currency_conversion
columns.comment: Whether vendor prices need to be converted from EUR to GBP

columns.name: offer_type
columns.check: offer_type IS NULL OR (offer_type::text = ANY (ARRAY['percentage_discount'::character varying, 'extra_pouches'::character varying]::text[]))
columns.comment: Type of offer: percentage_discount or extra_pouches

columns.name: offer_value
columns.comment: Offer value: percentage (0-100) for discount or number of extra pouches

columns.name: offer_description
columns.comment: Optional description text for the offer

columns.name: trustpilot_url
columns.comment: URL to the vendor's Trustpilot review page

columns.name: stock_status
columns.check: stock_status::text = ANY (ARRAY['in_stock'::character varying, 'out_of_stock'::character varying, 'low_stock'::character varying, 'discontinued'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: stock_status
columns.check: stock_status::text = ANY (ARRAY['in_stock'::character varying, 'out_of_stock'::character varying, 'low_stock'::character varying, 'discontinued'::character varying]::text[])
columns.comment: Product stock status: in_stock, out_of_stock, low_stock, discontinued

columns.name: subscription_plan
columns.comment: Subscription plan: free, pro, enterprise

name: automation_memory

columns.name: memory_value
columns.comment: JSON data stored as JSONB for efficiency

columns.name: expires_at
columns.comment: Optional expiration time for automatic cleanup

comment: Stores automation workflow memory (chat history, stages, etc.)

columns.name: pack_size
columns.check: pack_size::text = ANY (ARRAY['1pack'::character varying, '3pack'::character varying, '5pack'::character varying, '10pack'::character varying, '15pack'::character varying, '20pack'::character varying, '25pack'::character varying, '30pack'::character varying, '50pack'::character varying, '100pack'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: shipping_filter
columns.check: shipping_filter::text = ANY (ARRAY['fastest'::character varying, 'cheapest'::character varying, 'free'::character varying, 'all'::character varying]::text[])

name: feature_visibility
comment: Controls which features/modules each user can access in a workspace. Master admins can manage this to control user access to different parts of the CRM.

columns.name: platform
columns.check: platform::text = ANY (ARRAY['twitter'::character varying, 'facebook'::character varying, 'instagram'::character varying, 'linkedin'::character varying, 'pinterest'::character varying, 'whatsapp'::character varying, 'email'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: workspace_id
columns.comment: Workspace that owns this social media account

columns.name: content_type
columns.check: content_type::text = ANY (ARRAY['price_drop'::character varying, 'new_review'::character varying, 'back_in_stock'::character varying, 'product_spotlight'::character varying, 'blog_post'::character varying, 'custom'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: status
columns.check: status::text = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'posted'::character varying, 'failed'::character varying, 'scheduled'::character varying]::text[])

name: blog_posts

columns.name: wp_id
columns.comment: WordPress post ID (if migrated from WordPress)

columns.name: seo_meta
columns.comment: JSON object containing SEO metadata (title, description, keywords, og tags, etc.)

comment: Stores blog posts/guides that can be posted from CRM system

name: api_keys

columns.name: key_type
columns.comment: Type of API key: crm, crawler, or custom

columns.name: key_value
columns.comment: Encrypted or hashed API key value

comment: Stores API keys for CRM and other integrations

name: oauth_client_states
comment: Stores OAuth states for third-party provider authentication flows where Supabase acts as the OAuth client.

name: salary_comments

columns.name: salary_id
columns.comment: Reference to the salary entry

columns.name: share_id
columns.comment: Reference to the expense share

columns.name: commenter_name
columns.comment: Name of the person leaving the comment

columns.name: commenter_email
columns.comment: Email of the person leaving the comment

comment: Comments on salaries in expense shares for investor feedback

name: unmapped_products

columns.name: source_prices
columns.comment: JSON object with price tiers (1-pack, 3-pack, etc.)

columns.name: other_stores
columns.comment: JSON array of other stores selling similar products with match confidence scores

columns.name: status
columns.comment: Workflow status: pending (needs review), approved (created as new product), rejected (not added), mapped (linked to existing product)

columns.name: image_url
columns.comment: URL of the product image scraped from the vendor website

comment: Stores products found by scrapers that do not match any existing products in wp_products. Used for review and approval workflow.
